rationale: The LLM at this capability level (junior web security researcher, competent at basic scripting and API interaction) can provide modest assistance with Discovery tasks — generating enumeration scripts, interpreting AD/network scan outputs, and identifying high-value targets — but this step is already high-success for OC3 actors with admin rights using standard IT tools. The primary bottlenecks in Discovery (SOC detection, network segmentation) are not meaningfully addressed by LLM assistance at this capability tier, limiting uplift to approximately 3 percentage points above the 85% baseline mode. The narrow distribution (0.86-0.90) reflects both the constrained ceiling imposed by the already-high baseline and limited uncertainty about whether junior-level scripting/analysis assistance provides meaningful conversion of failure cases to successes.
